name: ecommerce-platform
description: E-Commerce Microservices Platform — local dev runner

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix services/user-service && npm install --prefix services/cart-service && npm install --prefix services/order-service
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "USER,CART,ORDER,PRODUCT,PAYMENT" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,green,magenta,blue" "npm run start:user" "npm run start:cart" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:payment"
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "USER,CART,ORDER" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,green" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:cart" "npm run dev:order"
